name: Balsamic Vinaigrette (Gr)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the vinegar, onion, and honey.
2. Puree until smooth.
3. With the motor running, slowly add the olive oil until emulsified.
4. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Pour into a squeeze bottle.
6. The vinaigrette may be prepared up to 1 day ahead and refrigerated.
7. Bring to room temperature before serving.
Yield: Approximately 3/4 cup
